aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation but lacks structured content and authority signals that AI models prioritize for citations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight existing FAQ content.
Add HowTo schema for common automotive air conditioning repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active Q&A section to engage with potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content
No HowTo schema for service processes
No Product schema for specific services like R-12, R134-a, R1234YF

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to specific automotive air conditioning services and repairs.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage and HowTo schema to leverage existing content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing your digital presence for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their strong GBP rating and positive reviews are not being fully leveraged in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, authority signals, and conversational content to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position.

email_subject_line: Maximize AI Visibility: Optimize Your Digital Presence for 2026
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search readiness.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top choice for AI-driven leads.
page_title: Automotive air conditioning service and repair
